mapper.select: SELECT * FROM T_TOPO_NE WHERE PARENT_DN = #{parentDn} ORDER BY NAME
SELECT * FROM T_TOPO_NE WHERE NE_TYPE = #{neType} AND PARENT_DN = #{parentDn}
SELECT * FROM T_TOPO_NE ORDER BY NE_TYPE, NAME
mapper.update: UPDATE T_TOPO_NE SET NAME = #{name}, DISPLAY_NAME = #{displayName}, PARENT_DN = #{parentDn}, ADDRESS = #{address}, LOCATION = #{location}, STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_TIME = #{updatedTime} WHERE DN = #{dn}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM T_TOPO_NE WHERE DN = #{dn}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_TOPO_NE WHERE NE_TYPE = #{neType}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_TOPO_NE SET PARENT_DN = #{newParentDn}, ROOT_SUBNET_DN = #{rootSubnetDn}, UPDATED_TIME = #{updatedTime} WHERE DN = #{dn}
